creator: shurd@FreeBSD.org
text:
I no longer use this package and a quick poke around indicates an updated port would take more work than I'm willing to invest.

The version is two years old now and buggy.  Unless a new maintainer shows up withing six months, this port should be removed.

Fix: 

-MAINTAINER=    shurd@sasktel.net
+MAINTAINER=    ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=       An interactive TV guide which will create personalized TV listings

 RUN_DEPENDS=   tv_cat:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-xmltv

+EXPIRATION_DATE=2007-11-03
+DEPRECATED=    Old version, no maintainer
 USE_JAVA=      yes
 USE_JIKES=     no
 JAVA_VERSION=  1.4+--Zo8hytoTb1Ws73LN4lKErgpniHQXswbRMgk3SK9MdOTXa1BE
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- freeguide.orig/Makefile     Thu May  3 13:49:30 2007
+++ freeguide/Makefile  Thu May  3 14:04:00 2007
@@ -12,11 +12,13 @@
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    freeguide-tv
 DISTNAME=      FreeGuide-${PORTVERSION}
